title: noccaea hastulata
intro: Noccaea hastulata, also known as Alpine Penny Cress, is a perennial plant species in the mustard family that grows in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Noccaea hastulata include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of Noccaea hastulata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various ailments.
